user.title: 💡 Add Smart Bulb Relay
user.description: Link a smart bulb to the relay that powers it. Enables one-command power-cycling and future auto-heal automations.

auto_discover.title: 💡 Auto-discovered pairings
auto_discover.description: All discovered relay → bulb pairings are pre-selected. Deselect any you don't want, then confirm to create them all at once. You can edit or delete individual pairings afterwards.

manual.title: 💡 Manual pairing
manual.description: Select the relay switch and the smart bulb it powers.

abort.already_configured: This relay/bulb pairing is already configured.

no_relay_for_light.message: No relay is paired with {entity_id}. Add a pairing via the Smart Bulb Relay integration first.

no_relay_for_device.message: No paired relay found for device {device_id}. Add a pairing via the Smart Bulb Relay integration first.

unsupported_entity.message: Unsupported entity {entity_id}: expected a light or switch.

no_target_specified.message: No entity or device was specified. Provide a target entity_id or device_id.

init.title: ✏️ Edit pairing
init.description: Update the relay switch or smart bulb for this pairing.

data_description.smart_mode_enabled: Expose a switch entity that toggles the Shelly watchdog smart/fallback mode.
data_description.power_sensor_entity_id: Power sensor on the relay circuit. Auto-discovered from the relay device if not set.
data_description.power_threshold_w: Wattage above which the Smart Bulb Status sensor reports the bulb as on.

power_cycle.name: Power-cycle relay
power_cycle.description: Power-cycles the relay that powers the target smart bulb. Target can be a paired light entity, a light device, or a switch entity/device directly.

power_cycle_delay.name: Power-cycle delay
power_cycle_delay.description: Seconds to keep the relay off before turning it back on.

factory_reset.name: Factory reset bulb
factory_reset.description: Triggers a factory reset by power-cycling the relay the configured number of times. The sequence (toggle count and durations) is chosen automatically based on the bulb manufacturer (IKEA: 6 × 2 s, Hue/Philips: 3 × 5 s). Override the fields below to use a custom sequence.

toggle_count.name: Toggle count
toggle_count.description: Number of off/on cycles. Overrides the manufacturer default.

off_duration.name: Off duration
off_duration.description: Seconds to keep the relay off per cycle. Overrides the manufacturer default.

on_duration.name: On duration
on_duration.description: Seconds to keep the relay on per cycle. Overrides the manufacturer default.

turn_on.name: Turn on smart light
turn_on.description: Turns on the smart bulb via the light entity. Falls back to powering the relay if the light is unavailable, or power-cycles it if the relay is already on but the light is unresponsive.

brightness_pct.name: Brightness
brightness_pct.description: Target brightness in percent (1–100). Defaults to 85%.

color_temp_kelvin.name: Color temperature
color_temp_kelvin.description: Target color temperature in Kelvin. Omit to keep the bulb's current value.

turn_off.name: Turn off smart light
turn_off.description: Turns off the smart bulb. Falls back to switching the relay off if the light is unavailable or does not respond.

toggle.name: Toggle smart light
toggle.description: Toggles the smart bulb on or off using the smart-light-first logic (light entity preferred, relay as fallback).

brightness_pct.name: Brightness
brightness_pct.description: Target brightness in percent when turning on (1–100). Defaults to 85%.

color_temp_kelvin.name: Color temperature
color_temp_kelvin.description: Target color temperature in Kelvin when turning on. Omit to keep the bulb's current value.

make_all_dumb.name: Make all switches dumb
make_all_dumb.description: Forces fallback (dumb) mode on every Smart Bulb Relay smart-mode switch, so all relays behave like normal wall switches.

make_all_smart.name: Make all switches smart
make_all_smart.description: Restores smart mode on every Smart Bulb Relay smart-mode switch, re-enabling bulb-aware control for all relays.
